igbo.handwaver_inspired_build_by_stretching: Sitere na HandWaver: wuo site n'ịgbatị ntụpọ → ahịrị → elu larịị → siri ike
igbo.click_ai_tutor_or_press_to_get_insight: Pịa "Onye nkuzi AI" ma ọ bụ pịa / iji nweta nghọta gbasara ọdịdị ugbu a.
igbo.build_geometry_by_stretching_a_point_i: Wuo geometry site n'ịgbatị ntụpọ ka ọ bụrụ ahịrị, ahịrị ka ọ bụrụ elu larịị, na elu larịị ka ọ bụrụ ihe siri ike. Ịgbatị ọ bụla na-agbakwunye ihe ọhụrụ na ihe nkiri.
igbo.mostly_points_stretch_any_to_begin_bui: Ọtụtụ ntụpọ — gbatịa nke ọ bụla iji malite iwu akụkụ ahịrị.
igbo.line_segments_dominate_stretching_them: Akụkụ ahịrị na-achị. Ịgbatị ha kwụ ọtọ na-enye elu larịị.
igbo.rectangles_dominate_stretch_perpendicu: Rectangles na-achị. Gbatịa kwụ ọtọ na elu larịị iji wepụta prism.
igbo.solids_dominate_each_prism_has_interio: Ihe siri ike na-achị. Prism ọ bụla nwere olu n'ime na oke elu.
igbo.predict_geometry_properties_as_you_str: Buo amụma njirimara geometry ka ị na-agbatị. Enweghị igodo azịza — ị na-aka nghọta gị onwe gị.
igbo.your_hypothesis_what_stretches_grow_le: Echiche gị (kedu ịgbatị na-eme ka ogologo too ngwa ngwa — mpaghara ngwa ngwa — olu ngwa ngwa?)
igbo.e_g_stretching_a_segment_perpendicular: dịka, ịgbatị akụkụ kwụ ọtọ na-eme ka mpaghara okpukpu abụọ mana olu chọrọ ịgbatị nke abụọ...
igbo.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Arapaara m — gosi ajụjụ ghe oghe
igbo.when_you_stretch_a_segment_perpendicul: Mgbe ị na-agbatị akụkụ kwụ ọtọ na onwe ya, gịnị na-eme na ọnụ ọgụgụ akụkụ ya?
igbo.if_centroid_shifts_after_a_stretch_wha: Ọ bụrụ na etiti na-agbanwe mgbe ịgbatị gasịrị, n'ụzọ ole ka ị gbatịsiri ike?
igbo.how_does_total_volume_change_vs_total_: Kedu ka ngụkọta olu si agbanwe megide ngụkọta mpaghara mgbe ị gbatịrị otu axis ugboro abụọ?
igbo.what_would_make_this_construction_symm: Gịnị ga-eme ka ihe owuwu a bụrụ nha anya gburugburu etiti ya?
igbo.i_can_explain_why_these_metrics_scale_: Enwere m ike ịkọwa ihe mere metrik ndị a ji ma na otú a ka m na-agbatị.
igbo.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget nyocha — enweghị akara, enweghị mkpughe, enweghị ịwụpụ azịza.
igbo.euler_s_polyhedron_formula_for_any_con: Usoro polyhedron nke Euler: maka polyhedron ọ bụla na-aṅụ, V − E + F = 2
igbo.webgl_is_disabled_or_unsupported: Akwụsịrị WebGL ma ọ bụ akwadoghị ya
igbo.alloflow_requires_hardware_acceleratio: AlloFlow chọrọ ngwa ngwa ngwaike iji gosipụta eserese 3D. Biko mee ka WebGL rụọ ọrụ na ntọala ihe nchọgharị gị iji soro ụlọ nyocha a mekọrịta.
igbo.drag_rotate_scroll_zoom_right_click_pa: 🖱️ Dọkpụrụ: tụgharịa • Pịgharịa: zoom • Pịa-aka nri: megharịa
igbo.tip_your_answer_must_be_within_5_of_th: 💡 Ndụmọdụ: Azịza gị ga-anọrịrị n'ime 5% nke ezigbo uru. Jiri π ≈ 3.14159
igbo.stl_files_are_unit_less_most_3d_printe: 💡 Faịlụ STL enweghị otu. Ọtụtụ ihe na-egbutu printa 3D (Cura, PrusaSlicer) na-eji milimita site na ndabara. Ọdịdị nwere obosara=5 ga-ebipụta obosara 5mm.

lingala.handwaver_inspired_build_by_stretching: Euti na HandWaver: tonga na kobenda litono → molongo → etando → eloko ya makasi
lingala.click_ai_tutor_or_press_to_get_insight: Fina "Molakisi AI" to fina / mpo na kozwa boyebi na ntina ya elilingi ya sikoyo.
lingala.build_geometry_by_stretching_a_point_i: Tonga géométrie na kobenda litono kokoma molongo, molongo kokoma etando, mpe etando kokoma eloko ya makasi. Kobenda nyonso ebakisaka eloko ya sika na scène.
lingala.mostly_points_stretch_any_to_begin_bui: Mingi litono — benda eloko nyonso mpo na kobanda kotonga biteni ya molongo.
lingala.line_segments_dominate_stretching_them: Biteni ya molongo ezali kokamba. Kobenda yango semba epesaka etando.
lingala.rectangles_dominate_stretch_perpendicu: Ba-rectangle ezali kokamba. Benda semba na etando mpo na kobimisa ba-prisme.
lingala.solids_dominate_each_prism_has_interio: Biloko ya makasi ezali kokamba. Prisme nyonso ezali na bonene ya kati mpe ndelo ya etando.
lingala.stretch_analyzer_inquiry_widget: 📐 Moanalyse ya Kobenda — Widget ya boluki
lingala.predict_geometry_properties_as_you_str: Sakola bizaleli ya géométrie ntango ozali kobenda. Fungola ya biyano te — yo moko olakisaka bososoli na yo.
lingala.your_hypothesis_what_stretches_grow_le: Hypothèse na yo (kobenda nini ekolisaka bolai noki — surface noki — volume noki?)
lingala.e_g_stretching_a_segment_perpendicular: ndakisa, kobenda eteni semba ekómisaka surface mbala mibale kasi volume esengeli kobenda ya mibale...
lingala.open_questions_no_answer_key: Mituna ya polele (fungola ya biyano te)
lingala.when_you_stretch_a_segment_perpendicul: Tango obendi eteni semba na yango moko, nini esalemaka na motango ya bonene na yango?
lingala.if_centroid_shifts_after_a_stretch_wha: Soki centre eningani sima ya kobenda, na ngámbo nini obendaki mingi?
lingala.how_does_total_volume_change_vs_total_: Ndenge nini volume mobimba ebongwanaka na surface mobimba tango obendi axe moko mbala mibale?
lingala.what_would_make_this_construction_symm: Nini ekokómisa botongi oyo symétrique zingazinga ya centre na yango?
lingala.i_can_explain_why_these_metrics_scale_: Nakoki kolimbola mpo na nini ba-mesure oyo emekamaka boye tango nazali kobenda.
lingala.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget ya boluki — score te, kobimisa te, kobimisa biyano te.
lingala.euler_s_polyhedron_formula_for_any_con: Formule ya polyèdre ya Euler: mpo na polyèdre nyonso convexe, V − E + F = 2
lingala.webgl_is_disabled_or_unsupported: WebGL ezali ya kokangama to esimbami te
lingala.alloflow_requires_hardware_acceleratio: AlloFlow esengeli na accélération ya matériel mpo na kolakisa ba-graphique 3D. Svp pesa nzela na WebGL na ba-paramètre ya navigateur na yo mpo na kosala na laboratoire oyo.
lingala.interactive_geometry_sandbox_3d_visual: Bomonisi 3D ya sanduku ya géométrie ya kosangana
lingala.drag_rotate_scroll_zoom_right_click_pa: 🖱️ Benda: baluka • Défiler: zoom • Fina-mobali: mema
lingala.tip_your_answer_must_be_within_5_of_th: 💡 Toli: Eyano na yo esengeli kozala na kati ya 5% ya valeur ya solo. Salela π ≈ 3.14159
lingala.stl_files_are_unit_less_most_3d_printe: 💡 Ba-fichier STL ezali na unité te. Ba-slicer mingi ya imprimante 3D (Cura, PrusaSlicer) basalelaka millimètre na défaut. Elilingi oyo ezali na largeur=5 ekobimisama largeur 5mm.
